questions.question: What mechanism does Vue 3 use to intercept reads and writes on reactive objects?
options: A JavaScript Proxy wrapping the object

questions.question: In Vue 3's reactivity system, what happens when a reactive property is READ inside a watchEffect?
options: The value is cached for performance
A dependency link is created between the effect and that property (tracking)

questions.question: What was the key limitation of Vue 2's reactivity system that Vue 3's Proxy approach solved?
options: Vue 2 could not track array mutations at all
Vue 2's Object.defineProperty could not detect new property additions
Vue 2 required TypeScript for reactivity to work
Vue 2 reactivity was synchronous and blocked the main thread
